---
title: "Compare"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

## Summary Table

This page is reserved for the cross-version comparison once the LIR outputs are synchronized.

| Version | Architecture | Objective | Key change | Status |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| v4_s1_logit_t | U-Net FM | residual_mu | logit-normal t sampling | Pending metrics |
| v4_s1_recoarsen_ft | U-Net FM | residual_mu | re-coarsening consistency | Pending metrics |
| v4_s1_cfg_ft | U-Net FM | residual_mu | condition dropout and CFG | Pending metrics |
| v4_s1_regional_ft | U-Net FM | residual_mu | weighted regional sampling | Pending metrics |
| v7a | Swin/FM | residual_mu | local window attention | Pending metrics |
| v8a | DiT/FM | residual_mu | global token attention | Pending metrics |
| v9a | SongUNet/EDM | residual_mu | CorrDiff-style EDM denoising | Pending metrics |
| v9b | SongUNet bridge | HR direct | stochastic bridge from noisy CNO | Pending metrics |
| v9c | DiT/FM | residual_mu | CFG + recoarsening | Pending metrics |

## Planned Metrics

| Metric | Why it matters |
|---|---|
| RMSE | Deterministic error against HR |
| Bias | Large-scale systematic offset |
| Residual std | Whether FM restores high-frequency energy |
| Spatial correlation | Whether residual structures are placed correctly |
| Coarsening error | Whether generated HR is consistent with LR after pooling |
